mixed-balanced.description: Evenly balance herb/compound representation while preserving safety and stale carryover pressure.

herb-heavy.description: Favor herb throughput while preserving guaranteed compound slots and safety overrides.

compound-heavy.description: Favor compounds while preserving guaranteed herb slots and safety overrides.

safety-priority-mixed.description: Mixed entity distribution with explicit safety critical escalation.

carryover-rescue-mixed.description: Mixed distribution that reserves slots for stale/blocked carryover entities, especially compounds.
